sections.label: TOOL CALL: python

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Level 2! Let me analyze the new board.
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Step:", current_frame.step)

# List all nodes
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    r_min, c_min = b[0]
    r_max = max(p[0] for p in b)
    c_max = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print("Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d, rows=%d-%d, cols=%d-%d, children=%s" % (
        n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], r_min, r_max, c_min, c_max, n['children']))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
